## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, review recent deliverables, and plan next steps for Outreach's content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [3 blogs delivered last week received positive feedback; minor edits needed for more conversational tone](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [43 new blog assignments proposed, categorized by topic clusters like AI workflow automation and revenue ops](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Looker dashboard being set up to integrate Google Search Console and Analytics data](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Outreach's brand presence in LLM responses increasing, especially compared to competitors](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Opportunity identified to leverage Reddit for faster LLM pickup of content](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)

## Topics

### Content Review and Feedback

  - [3 blogs delivered last week received minimal edits, especially from PMMs](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Suggestion to make language more casual/conversational, particularly in intros and transitions](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Team to update writing guidelines to incorporate more "plain-spokenness" in content](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)

### New Content Strategy and Assignments

  - [43 new blog assignments uploaded to Airtable, categorized by topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Titles and briefs AI-generated but subject to change after further SERP analysis](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Team to review assignments in Airtable and approve desired topics](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Discussion on providing traffic estimates based on search volume for approved topics](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Content Distribution and LLM Visibility

  - [Plans to distribute new content via LinkedIn ads, email, and content syndication](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Consideration of using Reddit posts to increase speed of LLM content pickup](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Outreach's LLM visibility increasing, especially in AI and workflow automation topics](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Some decrease noted in visibility for account-based marketing, personalization, and predictive analytics topics](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)

### Content Enhancement Strategies

  - [Proposal to interview internal experts for unique insights and quotes to differentiate content](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Suggestion to leverage Outreach Insights Group data for content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Discussion on taking opinionated stances on controversial topics like AI in cold calling](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Hadassah and Maria to review 43 new blog assignments in Airtable and approve desired topics](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Team to update writing guidelines for more conversational tone](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Aida to connect Airtable tables to show keyword volume data in assignments](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up Looker dashboard with integrated Google Search Console and Analytics data](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Hadassah and Maria to identify internal experts for potential interviews on specific topics](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=1679.0)
  - [Team to consider Reddit posting strategy for faster LLM content pickup](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
